gap: openinference.span.kind=AGENT is not on the classification ladder, so every agent turn captured by the CrewAI/LangChain/LlamaIndex/smolagents instrumentors ProveKit itself installs lands as a generic 'step'. Only frameworks that emit gen_ai.operation.name=invoke_agent ever produce an agent run.
note: This fixture asserts the mapping we WANT, under xfail. It turns green on its own the day the ladder reads openinference.span.kind.
